form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at Doomben 3&4yo Bm70 on March 18 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Alpha Bravo with 54kg at $20. Before that 6th of 10 at Doomben 3yo Bm65 on February 25 over 1200m, 3 len behind Point Vega with 59kg at $21. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Dual acceptor. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at Doomben 3&4yo Bm70 on March 18 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Alpha Bravo with 54kg at $20. Before that 6th of 10 at Doomben 3yo Bm65 on February 25 over 1200m, 3 len behind Point Vega with 59kg at $21. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over the concluding stages, shifted in before being corrected by its rider.
Raced greenly under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp October 18 over 1810m, a long neck behind Mr Worthington with 60kg at $14. At his first start won by 1.4 len Sunshine Coast 3yo Mdn-Sw September 21 over 1600m defeating Inside Passage with 58kg at $2.60. Promising three-year-old who finds an ideal race to launch this prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resuming after a six months break. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 5th of 8 at Goulburn Cl3 on February 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Cyclone Rupert carrying 61kg at $4.20. Second-up 4th of 8 at Goulburn Bm66 on March 22 over 1400m, slow going 2 len behind Acheson with 60kg at $5.50. Ready to peak after two runs back - the one they have to beat.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Form hard to fault. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at Eagle Farm Cl1 on March 25 over 1400m, 0.6 len behind Subterrain with 56kg at $14. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 13 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 7 over 1600m, slow going 2.75 len behind North Pole with 54kg at $26. SCRATCHED.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly with its head up in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at Doomben Mdn on March 11 over 1110m, slow going 5.5 len behind Sky Dweller with 56.5kg at $20. Second-up won by 1.3 len at Eagle Farm 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw March 25 over 1200m defeating Mr Hilton with 58kg at $15. Can go on with the job.

Second-up won by 1.3 len at Eagle Farm 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw March 25 over 1200m defeating Mr Hilton with 58kg at $15. Can go on with the job.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1000m, shifted in while racing greenly.
Shifted ground under pressure down the running.
Bumped on jumping. Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation eighth of 13 at Doomben City To Surf 3Q December 6 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Nightline with 57.5kg at $17. On debut fourth of 10 at Sunshine Coast 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Find Me carrying 58kg at $21. Prefer to see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Resuming. Finished off last preparation eighth of 13 at Doomben City To Surf 3Q December 6 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Nightline with 57.5kg at $17. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Approaching the 200m, shifted in when insufficiently clear.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run won by a neck at Doomben 3yo Mdn-Sw March 11 over 1650m on a rain affected track defeating I Am Louie carrying 53kg at $8.50. The run before that 4th of 14 at this track 3yo F Mdn on February 21 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Cool Moon with 58kg at $15. Freshened up to come back in trip - watch for a big finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Recent form sound. Comes here off a 30-day let-up. The run before that 4th of 14 at this track 3yo F Mdn on February 21 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Cool Moon with 58kg at $15. Freshened up to come back in trip - watch for a big finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily steadied near the 1100m and lost ground.

form.formComment: Most recently 9th of 11 at Toowoomba 3yo SW on March 27 over 1625m, 11 len behind Worthy Enuff carrying 57kg at $51. Before that 2nd of 8 at Coffs Harbour Cl1 on March 9 over 1412m, in the wet; 6 len behind Prince Of Prophets with 59kg at $18. Doubt he will be troubling these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Eased from heels rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 8th of 11 at Grafton Ctry Cl1 on March 15 over 1175m, 2.5 len behind Rich Star with 56kg at $6.50. Second run from a spell 4th of 10 at Grafton Ctry Cl1 on March 30 over 1420m, 0.7 len behind Xtreme carrying 56.5kg at $8. Other runners rate better this time.
